subcodes.first_line: Give ear to the call of heaven, saying: "The Truth hath come with manifest sovereignty!" and hear from the very air: "By God..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اذا اسمع ندآء السماء تقول قد اتی الحق بسلطان مشهود و اسمع من الهوآء تالله قد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
